security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src http: https:

bundle.longDescription: TermFleet is a terminal cockpit / multi-terminal operations workspace: a single keyboard-first developer operations center with a user-local PTY daemon, a Canvas2D terminal renderer, and a strategic operations map. Linux is the first release target.
